hero.name: Roster
hero.tagline: A small board of engineering jobs at indie-scale companies
hero.description: Hand-listed roles at companies under 50 people, with honest salary bands and a real interview process. No recruiter spam, no “rockstar”, no equity-only.

items.name: Platform Engineer
items.tagline: Run our probe service in production
items.description: Lead the next iteration of the synthetic probe layer. Go, Postgres, Cloudflare. Deep ownership over reliability.

items.name: Template Engineer
items.description: Ship five new starter templates a quarter, review community submissions, keep the CLI fast. Next.js + Tailwind expertise required.

items.name: Product Engineer
items.description: Own end-to-end product features in the AI workspace. Comfortable with TypeScript, Postgres, vector search, and saying no to scope.

items.name: Design Engineer
items.description: Cross-product designer who codes their own components. You’ll touch every product we make — Aether, ServerCompass, 1DevTool, the lot.

items.name: iOS Engineer
items.description: Two-person iOS team. Swift, Combine, full ownership of the App Store presence. We’re a small consumer team — no Slack-meetings every day.

items.name: Backend Engineer
items.description: Build the matching engine that keeps thousands of treasury accounts honest. Postgres, event-sourced workflows, audit trails by default.

items.name: Field Data Engineer
items.description: Help our reforestation cooperative collect, validate, and publish ten years of monitoring data per parcel. Python, plus six weeks a year on the field.

items.name: Frontend Engineer
items.description: React, TypeScript, the kind of perfectionism that produces 60fps drag-and-drop. Pair-programs three days a week with the design engineer.

items.name: CLI Engineer · Part-time
items.description: Quietly improve the npx 1devtool create flow — error handling, package manager detection, registry caching. Shipping, not meetings.

items.name: Audio Producer
items.description: Audio engineering, episode editing, transcript polishing, member Discord moderation. One day a week, ongoing contractor.
